headline: Mizuho Cuts Consolidated Edison (ED) to Neutral on Growth and Valuation Concerns
summary: With a 5-Year Average Dividend Growth Rate of 2.44%, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) is included among the Top 11 Dividend Kings to Buy for Safe Dividend Growth. On June 2, Mizuho downgraded Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) to Neutral from Outperform. It set a a $105 price target. The firm cited the company’s “constrained growth trajectory” […]
